response.justification: The role requires modern C++ (primary) or Rust as a core skill, but the candidate's only C++ exposure is roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a university thesis. C++ does not appear in the listed skills, and there is no Rust experience. While the geospatial background (GISCollective, Green Map) and Linux/distributed-systems exposure (Sociomantic) are relevant tangents, the primary technical requirement is not met. There is also an identity inconsistency worth flagging — the resume header reads 'Wei Chen' while the contact email, personal site, and code-hosting links all point to Bogdan Szabo.
strengths: Long-running geospatial/GIS work via GISCollective and Green Map
Linux server and some high-throughput distributed-systems experience at Sociomantic
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, OSS contributions)
concerns: Negligible modern C++ experience and no Rust experience — the role's core requirement
No navigation/routing-systems background or map-tiling pipeline work
Resume name ('Wei Chen') does not match the contact details and portfolio links (Bogdan Szabo)
